_comment: ADF pipeline definition for the SEC EDGAR Bronze ingest.
3 activities run sequentially: tickers -> submissions -> facts.
Import via: ADF Studio -> Author -> Pipelines -> ... -> Import from JSON.
Or deploy via az CLI:
az datafactory pipeline create \
--factory-name <ADF_NAME> \
--resource-group <RESOURCE_GROUP> \
--name sec-edgar-bronze-ingest \
--pipeline @workflows/adf_pipeline.json
deploy/deploy.ps1 injects the live host-executed Custom Activity command
at deploy time. That command unpacks sec-edgar-task.zip from Blob staging,
creates the uv-managed virtualenv on the Batch node, and runs the target
Python script on the VM host (not inside a container).
AzureStorageLS is account-scoped, so folderPath must include the
filesystem/container name: sec-edgar/adf-resources.
The checked-in command values below are readable placeholders only.
Manual imports must update the command values, SEC_USER_AGENT, storage
account, container, prefix, and managed identity client ID.
Timeouts are generous to accommodate full NYSE+Nasdaq runs:
IngestTickersExchange:  30 minutes
IngestSubmissions    :   4 hours   (~10k CIKs at 8 req/s with 4 workers)
IngestCompanyFacts   :   8 hours   (~10k CIKs sequential at 8 req/s)
name: sec-edgar-bronze-ingest

properties.description: Daily SEC EDGAR Bronze layer: ticker snapshot -> submissions -> XBRL facts

ingestDate.description: Partition date (YYYY-MM-DD). Set by DailyBronzeIngestTrigger; override for backfill.

activities.name: IngestTickersExchange
activities.description: Fetch full SEC ticker-exchange snapshot -> bronze/company_tickers_exchange/

activities.name: IngestCompanyFacts
activities.description: Bulk XBRL facts (all namespaces, all concepts) -> bronze/companyfacts/
